headline: FastAPI triage server (127.0.0.1:8765) — read conversations by index, record triage verdicts that fan out atlas-sync + Optogon reasoning, serve atlas viewer HTML.

capabilities.notes: Returns one full conversation (title + messages) by numeric index into memory_db.json. 400 on non-int, 404 out of range.

Upserts a triage verdict (KEEP/CLOSE/MINE/ARCHIVE/REVIEW/DROP/DONE/SKIP) into thread_decisions.json, then fires _run_sync_pipeline (fs_actor.py + decisions_to_atlas.py) on a daemon thread; REVIEW on fs- cards also starts an Optogon triage session.
StaticFiles mount over the service dir (html=True). Serves thread_cards.html, cognitive_atlas.html and other atlas viewers; '/' returns index.html. Closest thing to a public read/health surface.
